items.description: Explicit Feedback Reasons at Prompt Template Level
items.expression:
SELECT GenAIFeedbackDetail__dlm.appFeedback__c AS app_feedback__c, GenAIGatewayRequest__dlm.promptTemplateDevName__c AS prompt_template__c,
    GenAIFeedback__dlm.feedback__c AS feedback__c, COUNT(GenAIGatewayRequest__dlm.promptTemplateDevName__c ) AS counts__c
FROM GenAIFeedbackDetail__dlm
    FULL OUTER JOIN GenAIFeedback__dlm ON (GenAIFeedbackDetail__dlm.parent__c = GenAIFeedback__dlm.feedbackId__c)
    FULL OUTER JOIN GenAIGeneration__dlm ON (GenAIFeedback__dlm.generationId__c = GenAIGeneration__dlm.generationId__c) 
    FULL OUTER JOIN GenAIGatewayResponse__dlm ON (GenAIGeneration__dlm.generationResponseId__c = GenAIGatewayResponse__dlm.generationResponseId__c) 
    FULL OUTER JOIN GenAIGatewayRequest__dlm ON (GenAIGatewayResponse__dlm.generationRequestId__c = GenAIGatewayRequest__dlm.gatewayRequestId__c)
WHERE GenAIGatewayRequest__dlm.promptTemplateDevName__c  IS NOT NULL
AND GenAIFeedback__dlm.feedback__c = 'BAD'
GROUP BY prompt_template__c, feedback__c, app_feedback__c

items.description: Explicit Feedback at Prompt Template Level
items.expression:
SELECT GenAIGatewayRequest__dlm.promptTemplateDevName__c AS prompt_template__c, GenAIFeedback__dlm.feedback__c AS feedback__c, COUNT(GenAIFeedback__dlm.feedback__c) AS counts__c
FROM GenAIFeedback__dlm 
    FULL OUTER JOIN GenAIGeneration__dlm ON (GenAIFeedback__dlm.generationId__c = GenAIGeneration__dlm.generationId__c) 
    FULL OUTER JOIN GenAIGatewayResponse__dlm ON (GenAIGeneration__dlm.generationResponseId__c = GenAIGatewayResponse__dlm.generationResponseId__c) 
    FULL OUTER JOIN GenAIGatewayRequest__dlm ON (GenAIGatewayResponse__dlm.generationRequestId__c = GenAIGatewayRequest__dlm.gatewayRequestId__c)
WHERE GenAIGatewayRequest__dlm.promptTemplateDevName__c  IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY prompt_template__c, feedback__c

measures.formula: SUM( CASE  WHEN (   amd_odbc_ehr_itemdiagnosis__dlm.DiagnosisCode__c = 'I83.10'   or amd_odbc_ehr_itemdiagnosis__dlm.DiagnosisCode__c = 'I83.11'   or amd_odbc_ehr_itemdiagnosis__dlm.DiagnosisCode__c = 'I83.12'   or amd_odbc_ehr_itemdiagnosis__dlm.DiagnosisCode__c = 'I83.811'   or amd_odbc_ehr_itemdiagnosis__dlm.DiagnosisCode__c = 'I83.812'   or amd_odbc_ehr_itemdiagnosis__dlm.DiagnosisCode__c = 'I83.813'   or amd_odbc_ehr_itemdiagnosis__dlm.DiagnosisCode__c = 'I83.819'   or amd_odbc_ehr_itemdiagnosis__dlm.DiagnosisCode__c = 'I83.891'   or amd_odbc_ehr_itemdiagnosis__dlm.DiagnosisCode__c = 'I83.892'   or amd_odbc_ehr_itemdiagnosis__dlm.DiagnosisCode__c = 'I83.893'   or amd_odbc_ehr_itemdiagnosis__dlm.DiagnosisCode__c = 'I83.899' ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)

items.description: Explicit Feedback Reasons at Prompt Template Version Level
items.expression:
SELECT GenAIFeedbackDetail__dlm.appFeedback__c AS app_feedback__c, GenAIGatewayRequest__dlm.promptTemplateDevName__c AS prompt_template__c, GenAIGatewayRequest__dlm.promptTemplateVersionNo__c AS prompt_template_version__c,
GenAIFeedback__dlm.feedback__c AS feedback__c, COUNT(GenAIGatewayRequest__dlm.promptTemplateVersionNo__c) AS counts__c
FROM GenAIFeedbackDetail__dlm
    FULL OUTER JOIN GenAIFeedback__dlm ON (GenAIFeedbackDetail__dlm.parent__c = GenAIFeedback__dlm.feedbackId__c)
    FULL OUTER JOIN GenAIGeneration__dlm ON (GenAIFeedback__dlm.generationId__c = GenAIGeneration__dlm.generationId__c) 
    FULL OUTER JOIN GenAIGatewayResponse__dlm ON (GenAIGeneration__dlm.generationResponseId__c = GenAIGatewayResponse__dlm.generationResponseId__c) 
    FULL OUTER JOIN GenAIGatewayRequest__dlm ON (GenAIGatewayResponse__dlm.generationRequestId__c = GenAIGatewayRequest__dlm.gatewayRequestId__c)
WHERE GenAIGatewayRequest__dlm.promptTemplateDevName__c  IS NOT NULL
AND GenAIFeedback__dlm.feedback__c = 'BAD'
GROUP BY prompt_template__c, prompt_template_version__c, feedback__c, app_feedback__c

items.description: Explicit Feedback at Prompt Template Version Level
items.expression:
SELECT GenAIGatewayRequest__dlm.promptTemplateDevName__c AS prompt_template__c, GenAIGatewayRequest__dlm.promptTemplateVersionNo__c AS prompt_template_version__c,
GenAIFeedback__dlm.feedback__c AS feedback__c, COUNT(GenAIGatewayRequest__dlm.promptTemplateVersionNo__c) AS counts__c
FROM GenAIFeedback__dlm 
    FULL OUTER JOIN GenAIGeneration__dlm ON (GenAIFeedback__dlm.generationId__c = GenAIGeneration__dlm.generationId__c)
    FULL OUTER JOIN GenAIGatewayResponse__dlm ON (GenAIGeneration__dlm.generationResponseId__c = GenAIGatewayResponse__dlm.generationResponseId__c) 
    FULL OUTER JOIN GenAIGatewayRequest__dlm ON (GenAIGatewayResponse__dlm.generationRequestId__c = GenAIGatewayRequest__dlm.gatewayRequestId__c)
WHERE GenAIGatewayRequest__dlm.promptTemplateDevName__c  IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY prompt_template__c, prompt_template_version__c, feedback__c

SELECT
  COUNT(ssot__AccountContact__dlm.Contact__c) AS referring_provider__c,
  ssot__Individual__dlm.ssot__Id__c AS individual__c,
  ssot__Individual__dlm.ssot__PersonName__c AS name__c
FROM ssot__AccountContact__dlm
  JOIN ssot__Individual__dlm
    ON (ssot__AccountContact__dlm.EHR_Referral_Source_Contact__c = ssot__Individual__dlm.ssot__Id__c)
GROUP BY
  individual__c,
  name__c

SELECT
  SUM( CASE  WHEN (RDS_vw_ODBC_appts_Appointments_other__dlm.ApptTypes__c contains 'VEIN') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hasvenousdisease__c,
  UnifiedIndividual__dlm.ssot__Id__c AS unififed_individual__c,
  ssot__Individual__dlm.ssot__Id__c AS individual__c
FROM UnifiedIndividual__dlm
  LEFT OUTER JOIN IndividualIdentityLink__dlm
    ON (UnifiedIndividual__dlm.ssot__Id__c = IndividualIdentityLink__dlm.UnifiedRecordId__c)
  LEFT OUTER JOIN ssot__Individual__dlm
    ON (IndividualIdentityLink__dlm.SourceRecordId__c = ssot__Individual__dlm.ssot__Id__c AND IndividualIdentityLink__dlm.KQ_SourceRecordId__c = ssot__Individual__dlm.KQ_Id__c)
  JOIN RDS_vw_ODBC_appts_Appointments_other__dlm
    ON (ssot__Individual__dlm.ssot__Id__c = RDS_vw_ODBC_appts_Appointments_other__dlm.PatientFID__c AND ssot__Individual__dlm.KQ_Id__c = RDS_vw_ODBC_appts_Appointments_other__dlm.KQ_PatientFID__c)
GROUP BY
  unififed_individual__c,
  individual__c

measures.formula: SUM( CASE  WHEN (RDS_vw_ODBC_appts_Appointments_other__dlm.ApptTypes__c RLIKE 'VEIN') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)

items.expression:
SELECT amd_pm_vw_odbc_actv_claimsubmission__dlm.DataSourceObject__c as dso__c, count(*) as claim_count__c
FROM amd_pm_vw_odbc_actv_claimsubmission__dlm
LEFT JOIN (
SELECT
amd_pm_vw_odbc_actv_claimsubmission__dlm.claimid__c as id__c,
REGEXP_EXTRACT(amd_pm_vw_odbc_actv_claimsubmission__dlm.claimid__c,'([0-9]+)', 1) AS prefix__c
FROM
amd_pm_vw_odbc_actv_claimsubmission__dlm
WHERE REGEXP_EXTRACT(amd_pm_vw_odbc_actv_claimsubmission__dlm.claimid__c,'([A-Z]+)', 1)  NOT IN ('A')
) b
ON REGEXP_EXTRACT(amd_pm_vw_odbc_actv_claimsubmission__dlm.claimid__c,'([0-9]+)', 1) = b.prefix__c
WHERE b.id__c IS NULL
GROUP BY amd_pm_vw_odbc_actv_claimsubmission__dlm.DataSourceObject__c

SELECT
  COUNT(ssot__AccountContact__dlm.EHR_Referral_Source_Contact__c) AS patientreferred__c,
  UnifiedIndividual__dlm.ssot__Id__c AS unified_individual__c,
  ssot__Individual__dlm.ssot__Id__c AS individual__c
FROM UnifiedIndividual__dlm
  LEFT OUTER JOIN IndividualIdentityLink__dlm
    ON (UnifiedIndividual__dlm.ssot__Id__c = IndividualIdentityLink__dlm.UnifiedRecordId__c)
  LEFT OUTER JOIN ssot__Individual__dlm
    ON (IndividualIdentityLink__dlm.SourceRecordId__c = ssot__Individual__dlm.ssot__Id__c)
  LEFT OUTER JOIN ssot__AccountContact__dlm
    ON (IndividualIdentityLink__dlm.SourceRecordId__c = ssot__AccountContact__dlm.EHR_Referral_Source_Contact__c)
  LEFT OUTER JOIN amd_odbc_ehr_itemdiagnosis__dlm
    ON (ssot__Individual__dlm.ssot__Id__c = amd_odbc_ehr_itemdiagnosis__dlm.PatientID__c)
GROUP BY
  unified_individual__c,
  individual__c

items.description: Number of generations at Prompt Template Level
items.expression:
SELECT GenAIGatewayRequest__dlm.promptTemplateDevName__c AS prompt_template__c, COUNT(GenAIGatewayRequest__dlm.gatewayRequestId__c) AS generation_count__c
FROM GenAIGatewayRequest__dlm
WHERE GenAIGatewayRequest__dlm.promptTemplateDevName__c  IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY GenAIGatewayRequest__dlm.promptTemplateDevName__c

SELECT amd_pm_vw_odbc_actv_claimsubmission__dlm.claimid__c as id__c ,  sum(amd_pm_vw_odbc_actv_claimsubmission__dlm.totalamount__c) as claim_count__c
FROM amd_pm_vw_odbc_actv_claimsubmission__dlm
LEFT JOIN (
SELECT
amd_pm_vw_odbc_actv_claimsubmission__dlm.claimid__c as id__c,
REGEXP_EXTRACT(amd_pm_vw_odbc_actv_claimsubmission__dlm.claimid__c,'([0-9]+)', 1) AS prefix__c
FROM
amd_pm_vw_odbc_actv_claimsubmission__dlm
WHERE REGEXP_EXTRACT(amd_pm_vw_odbc_actv_claimsubmission__dlm.claimid__c,'([A-Z]+)', 1)  NOT IN ('A')
) b
ON REGEXP_EXTRACT(amd_pm_vw_odbc_actv_claimsubmission__dlm.claimid__c,'([0-9]+)', 1) = b.prefix__c
WHERE b.id__c IS NULL
GROUP BY amd_pm_vw_odbc_actv_claimsubmission__dlm.claimid__c

SELECT
  COUNT( CASE  WHEN (amd_odbc_ehr_itemdiagnosis__dlm.DiagnosisCode__c contains 'I83') THEN '1' ELSE '0' END) AS venouspatients__c,
  ssot__AccountContact__dlm.EHR_Referral_Source_Contact__c AS referring_provider__c
FROM UnifiedIndividual__dlm
  LEFT OUTER JOIN IndividualIdentityLink__dlm
    ON (UnifiedIndividual__dlm.ssot__Id__c = IndividualIdentityLink__dlm.UnifiedRecordId__c)
  LEFT OUTER JOIN ssot__Individual__dlm
    ON (IndividualIdentityLink__dlm.SourceRecordId__c = ssot__Individual__dlm.ssot__Id__c AND IndividualIdentityLink__dlm.KQ_SourceRecordId__c = ssot__Individual__dlm.KQ_Id__c)
  LEFT OUTER JOIN ssot__AccountContact__dlm
    ON (ssot__Individual__dlm.ssot__Id__c = ssot__AccountContact__dlm.ssot__Id__c AND ssot__Individual__dlm.KQ_Id__c = ssot__AccountContact__dlm.KQ_Id__c)
  LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT ssot__AccountContact__dlm.ssot__Id__c AS ssot__Id__c, ssot__AccountContact__dlm.KQ_Id__c AS KQ_Id__c FROM ssot__AccountContact__dlm) load_data_source4
    ON (ssot__AccountContact__dlm.EHR_Referral_Source_Contact__c = load_data_source4.ssot__Id__c AND ssot__AccountContact__dlm.KQ_EHR_Referral_Source_Contact__c = load_data_source4.KQ_Id__c)
  LEFT OUTER JOIN amd_odbc_ehr_itemdiagnosis__dlm
    ON (ssot__Individual__dlm.ssot__Id__c = amd_odbc_ehr_itemdiagnosis__dlm.PatientID__c)
GROUP BY referring_provider__c

measures.formula: COUNT( CASE  WHEN (amd_odbc_ehr_itemdiagnosis__dlm.DiagnosisCode__c RLIKE 'I83') THEN '1' ELSE '0' END)

items.expression:
SELECT
  COUNT(ssot__AccountContact__dlm.Contact__c) AS referring_provider__c,
  ssot__Individual__dlm.ssot__Id__c AS individual__c,
  ssot__Individual__dlm.ssot__FirstName__c AS first_name__c,
  ssot__Individual__dlm.ssot__LastName__c AS last_name__c
FROM ssot__AccountContact__dlm
  JOIN ssot__Individual__dlm
    ON (ssot__AccountContact__dlm.EHR_Referral_Source_Contact__c = ssot__Individual__dlm.ssot__Id__c)
GROUP BY
  individual__c,
  first_name__c,
  last_name__c

SELECT amd_pm_vw_odbc_actv_claimsubmission__dlm.DataSourceObject__c as dso__c, APPROX_COUNT_DISTINCT( REGEXP_EXTRACT(amd_pm_vw_odbc_actv_claimsubmission__dlm.claimid__c,'([0-9]+)', 1) ) as claim_count__c
FROM amd_pm_vw_odbc_actv_claimsubmission__dlm
GROUP BY amd_pm_vw_odbc_actv_claimsubmission__dlm.DataSourceObject__c
